metadata.description: AIDLC × AgenticOps — plugin marketplace that automates the full AI-Driven Development Lifecycle with agent-based operations on AWS.

plugins.name: agentic-platform
plugins.description: Build and operate agentic AI workloads on EKS with vLLM, Inference Gateway, Langfuse, and Kagent. Covers GPU planning, model serving, routing, observability, and guardrails.

plugins.name: agenticops
plugins.description: Agentic operations layer for AIDLC — self-improving loops, autonomous deploys, continuous evaluation, incident response, and cost governance.

plugins.name: aidlc-inception
plugins.description: AIDLC Phase 1 — Inception. Workspace detection, requirements analysis, user stories, and workflow planning as opt-in extensions to awslabs/aidlc-workflows.

plugins.name: aidlc-construction
plugins.description: AIDLC Phase 2 — Construction. Component design, code generation, and test strategy for agentic systems as opt-in extensions to awslabs/aidlc-workflows.
